name: sabbk-forge
description: Sabbk's agent-workshop bootstrap/execution layer — boots Pi agents on the earendil-works/pi runtime from a manifest, with shared memory (git handoffs) and stop-ask-resume human checkpoints.
comment: pi is pinned EXACT (no ^ or ~) on purpose — pi is a consumed dependency behind lib/pi-adapter.mjs, not something we patch. Bump deliberately and re-run the spike. pi's CONTRIBUTING auto-closes outside PRs, so fork only if a real need appears.
